subtitle: Welcome to Omniventory — your all-in-one inventory system.

expiryCard.title: Best-before & Expiry Reminders
expiryCard.description: Track food, medicine, and consumables with advance alerts before items expire.

durableCard.title: Durable-goods Ledger
durableCard.description: Record serial numbers, warranties, purchase value, and full lifecycle history for durable assets.

consumableCard.title: Consumable Stock
consumableCard.description: Monitor stock levels with in/out movement logs, minimum thresholds, and low-stock alerts.
